name: certificate_date_present
expression: certificate_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(certificate_date)) > 0
description: certificate_date is required for Tenant Estoppel Certificate extraction.

name: tenant_name_present
expression: tenant_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(tenant_name)) > 0
description: tenant_name is required for Tenant Estoppel Certificate extraction.

name: property_address_present
expression: property_address IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(property_address)) > 0
description: property_address is required for Tenant Estoppel Certificate extraction.

name: lease_end_date_present
expression: lease_end_date IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(lease_end_date)) > 0
description: lease_end_date is required for Tenant Estoppel Certificate extraction.

name: current_monthly_rent_present
expression: current_monthly_rent IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(current_monthly_rent)) > 0
description: current_monthly_rent is required for Tenant Estoppel Certificate extraction.

name: defaults_claimed_present
expression: defaults_claimed IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(defaults_claimed)) > 0
description: defaults_claimed is required for Tenant Estoppel Certificate extraction.

name: tenant_signer_name_present
expression: tenant_signer_name IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(TRIM(tenant_signer_name)) > 0
description: tenant_signer_name is required for Tenant Estoppel Certificate extraction.

name: current_monthly_rent_non_negative
description: current_monthly_rent should be non-negative when present.

name: security_deposit_amount_non_negative
description: security_deposit_amount should be non-negative when present.
